audit_items.proof_trace: Lines 131-133 unconditionally check `s_auctionStarts[address(order.sellToken)] == 0` and revert with `InvalidAuction` before any auction-dependent logic executes. This is the only execution path through `isValidSignature` (external view, no alternate entry), and `s_auctionStarts` cannot be modified during a view call, so the invariant holds for all callers.
